data.title: Russia Faces Surge in Crypto Crime, Supreme Court Prepares Legislation
data.description:
Cases where digital currency is the means, income, or object of the crime are on the rise, said the Chairperson of Russia’s Supreme Court.
source: https://decrypt.co/307199/russia-faces-surge-in-crypto-crime-supreme-court-prepares-legislation

data.title: SEC officially drops its case against Coinbase
data.description:
The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is abandoning its lawsuit against Coinbase, closing a case that had dragged on for nearly two years and racked up millions in legal fees. The decision, which is pending final approval from the SEC’s commissioners, brings an end to what Coinbase has repeatedly called an “unlawful enforcement case.” Coinbase […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sec-officially-drops-its-case-against-coinbase/

data.title: Memhash (MEMHASH) will be listed on Bitget pre-market trading market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitget announced that it will launch Memhash (MEMHASH) in the pre-market trading market at 22:00 today (UTC+8).

data.title: SEC Coinbase Lawsuit Dismissed: Paving the Way for Clear Crypto Regulation
data.description:
The post SEC Coinbase Lawsuit Dismissed: Paving the Way for Clear Crypto Regulation appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
In a groundbreaking development, the Securities and Exchange Commission has agreed to drop the case against Coinbase, pending approval from the agency’s commissioners. This could be a major legal win for the cryptocurrency industry. The U.S. SEC will soon vote on a deal...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/just-in-sec-to-drop-case-against-coinbase-marking-major-win-for-crypto-industry/

data.title: Coinbase, SEC Reach Agreement to Dismiss Lawsuit
data.description:
The regulator will vote on whether to approve the agreement next week, with Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong calling it "hugely vindicating."
source: https://decrypt.co/307206/coinbase-sec-reach-agreement-to-dismiss-lawsuit

data.title: BSC Meme Project Perry Supports FTX Damaged Users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Meme project Perry on BSC announced that it has raised 2 million Perrys through the community, and the donation funds will be used to compensate the users affected by the FTX incident. All affected users can register through Perry's official Twitter account, and will receive unified compensation later. Perry said that it strongly condemned FTX's refusal to compensate affected users in China, Russia, Egypt, Nigeria, Ukraine and other regions. Perry has always stood firmly on the side of the vulnerable groups and resolutely does not tolerate any unjust behavior.

data.title: Coinbase Legal Officer: Will not stop fighting until the U.S. sets clear rules
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase Legal Officer paulgrewal.eth posted on the X platform: "The case is dismissed." These are two sentences that the defendant in every case is eager to hear. Today, we can announce that the SEC is withdrawing our case after the approval of the full committee. There will be no settlement or compromise-the mistakes will be corrected.
We still have a lot of work to do and cannot take it lightly. Legislation is critical to ensure that such illegal behavior does not happen again. We will not stop fighting until our rules are clear. Cooperation will be key. We look forward to working with Congress and SEC staff to advance the next stage of progress.

data.title: Analysis: SEC's abandonment of lawsuit against Coinbase will benefit tokens that were once considered securities, including BNB, SOL, ADA, etc.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The SEC may abandon the lawsuit against Coinbase, and this decision may have a positive impact on the cryptocurrency market. Previously, the SEC had identified multiple cryptocurrency tokens as securities, causing exchanges such as Robinhood to delist related tokens.
If the SEC abandons the case, exchanges such as Robinhood will be more confident to re-list these tokens, thereby increasing trading revenue. In addition, more crypto companies may consider listing in the United States to further promote the development of the industry. Tokens that have been considered securities in the market include BNB, SOL, ADA, etc. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Musk to scale up graphics resolution for Grok to do better than AAA games
data.description:
Tesla CEO Elon Musk says his artificial intelligence (AI) company xAI plans to improve the capabilities of its latest model, Grok 3, to scale up graphics resolution for developers to build games better than AAA titles. On Friday, internet personality Mario Nawfal shared a video on social media platform X in which a developer reportedly […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/musk-to-scale-up-graphic-resolution-for-grok/
